items.title: These 3 Banks Are Rallying Into Year-End, But Will It Continue?
items.description: Bank stocks are rallying into year-end, but while Citi still has momentum and Wells Fargo is ready to play catch up, Goldman’s rally could be topping out.

items.title: 2026 Could Be Explosive For The SPDR Dow Jones REIT, And It’s 4% Dividend
items.description: The SPDR Dow Jones REIT ETF (NYSEARCA:RWR) occupies an unusual space in the REIT universe. With just $1.7 billion in assets, it’s small enough to fly under the radar, yet its 24-year track record and roughly 4% dividend yield have kept it quietly relevant. The ETF recently trades around $99, up 3% year-to-date through mid-December, ... 2026 Could Be Explosive For The SPDR Dow Jones REIT, And It’s 4% Dividend

items.title: This ETF Caught a Major Tailwind After the Fed’s Rate Cut
items.description: Following the Federal Reserve’s third and final interest rate cut of 2025, this financials sector ETF is poised to profit in the year ahead.

items.title: China's Power Capacity Surpasses US— Elon Musk Calls It 'Major Competitive Disadvantage'
items.description: China's power generation capacity now exceeds the U.S., with rapid expansion and renewable energy growth giving it a strategic edge in AI, according to reports and Elon Musk.
